payload.goal: Update the helper CLI PRD with install wizard user stories and related requirements.
payload.why: Add traceable PRD coverage for an install wizard that installs opencode-helper globally on macOS/Linux and updates PATH by editing the correct shell config.
inputs_already_verified: Wizard must include PATH updating and detecting the correct local shell config.
Decision: zsh PATH updates go to ~/.zshrc.
changes: Add a functional requirement for interactive install wizard that prompts for install location, suggests safe OS-sensitive defaults, and updates PATH via shell rc edits.
Add a functional requirement for non-interactive install flags suitable for CI/power users (at least --yes and --bin-dir; optionally --dry-run).
Add a functional requirement for idempotent shell config edits (stable markers; no duplicate PATH entries) and for sudo usage only when user chooses a privileged install directory.
Add a new feature entry (next FEAT id) for the install wizard and link it to the new requirements.
Add two new user stories (next US ids after US-011) with concrete acceptance criteria: global install works in a new terminal; shell detection covers zsh/bash/fish; zsh uses ~/.zshrc.
Update PRD success criteria / user value bullets if needed, and update the traceability matrix for the new REQ/FEAT/US entries.
tests: Ensure anchors and internal links resolve (REQ/FEAT/US IDs).
Ensure traceability matrix rows include the new IDs.
Ensure user stories reference at least one FEAT and one REQ.
done_when: docs/opencode-helper-cli.md includes new install-related REQ entries and links.
docs/opencode-helper-cli.md includes a new FEAT entry for install wizard.
docs/opencode-helper-cli.md includes two new US entries for installation/wizard with clear acceptance criteria.
abort_if: You cannot determine the next available REQ/FEAT/US IDs from the document.
You would need to edit files outside docs/opencode-helper-cli.md.
